nasb.text: But both man and beast must be covered with sackcloth; and let men call on God earnestly that each may turn from his wicked way and from the violence which is in his hands.

esv.text: but let man and beast be covered with sackcloth, and let them call out mightily to God. Let everyone turn from his evil way and from the violence that is in his hands.

cnv.text: 不論人畜，都要披上麻衣；各人要懇切呼求　神，悔改，離開惡行，摒棄手中的強暴。

ccb.text: 人和牲畜都必须披上麻衣，众人要向上帝恳切呼求，改邪归正，停止作恶。

csbs.text: 人和牲畜都当披上麻布；各人都当迫切地向神呼求，从自己邪恶的道路上、手里的残暴中转回。
